title: Jamboree Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Jamboree Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jamboree Education family as a Subject Matter Expert in Bhubaneswar. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jamboree Education:
Jamboree Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jamboree Education!
